listening.title: Listening: Daily routine form
listening.transcript: I wake up at six o'clock every day. I brush my teeth, then I take a shower and get dressed. I eat breakfast at home and leave home at seven thirty. I arrive at school at eight o'clock.

questions.question: What time does the speaker arrive at school?
questions.explanation: "I arrive at school at eight o'clock."

listening.title: Listening: Who does what at home
listening.transcript: My mother cleans the house and washes the clothes. My father waters the plants and repairs things. My sister irons the clothes every weekend, and I take out the rubbish every evening.

questions.question: Who irons the clothes?
questions.explanation: "My sister irons the clothes every weekend."
